productDisplayName: Baggit Women Era Taj  Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette, has a flap style opening with a button closureVelvet and synthetic overlays on the flapSix card holders, three compartments, one zippered separator and an id card holder in the main compartmentSix card holders and a pocket on the inner side of the flapA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
